Global (All).title: US and China Agree to Resume Diplomatic Relations
Global (All).summary: The US and China agreed to resume diplomatic relations, easing tensions between the two nations.

Global (All).title: UK Supreme Court Rules on Brexit Settlement Agreement
Global (All).summary: The UK Supreme Court rules that the government's Brexit settlement agreement is lawful, but also makes clear that Parliament had the authority to reject or approve the agreement.

Global (All).title: Global Food Prices Rise Due to Drought and War
Global (All).summary: Global food prices rise due to drought and war, potentially leading to food insecurity in affected regions.

United States.title: Heatwaves Cause Mass Power Outages in Western United States
United States.summary: A massive heatwave continues to grip western United States, causing severe heat-related health issues and mass power outages. Temperatures soared to record highs, forcing thousands to seek refuge in cooling centers.

United States.title: Racial Tensions Rise in Minneapolis Amid Protests Over Police Killing
United States.summary: Racial tensions are running high in Minneapolis after a police shooting left an African American man dead. Protests are erupting across the city, with some turning violent. The situation remains volatile and potentially destabilizing.

United States.title: Cyberattack on Major US Healthcare Provider Exposes Thousands of Patient Records
United States.summary: A cyberattack on a major US healthcare provider has exposed thousands of patient records. The breach is believed to have occurred over several months, with hackers accessing sensitive information including names, addresses, and medical histories.

South Korea.title: Seoul's subway workers begin strike after failed talks with government
N. Korea fires missile amid US-S. Korea joint military drills
